items.title: 2 defense tech companies sue US Navy after losing out on MUSV program
items.summary: Two defense tech companies sued the U.S. government, alleging they were unfairly excluded from the Navy's Medium Unmanned Surface Vessel program.

items.title: SpaceX aborts Starship Flight 13 launch attempt
items.summary: SpaceX aborted the launch of its latest Starship test flight July 16 when some of the vehicle’s engines failed to ignite.
